policy.sameSegment: Beaches in the same curated shoreline segment should render the same visible exposure level unless a verified local morphology or wind-sport exception locks a stricter level.
policy.confidence: Segment propagation may support map-color consistency and medium review, but it never creates high confidence by itself.

segments.notes: Agios Sostis, Ai Giannis, Lia, and Psili Ammos are neighboring east-facing Serifos records; access and organized-service differences remain separate.
Alevrakia, Karavi, and Livadakia are close southeast-facing port-side records; Avlomonas is kept outside due to different south-facing bay behavior.
Vagia, Ganema, and Koutalas are neighboring southwest-facing south Serifos records; amenities and road access remain separate.
Achladi and Kalogeros are adjacent south/southeast-facing west-coast records; boat-only access remains a separate top-pick blocker.
Vorino, Mesiano, and Platys Gialos are adjacent north-facing north Serifos bay records.
Gialoudi, Karavas, and Sykamia are neighboring north/northwest-facing west-north Serifos records; Skala is kept separate because east-wind exposure differs.
